final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: sci-fi concept art
Asset type: panoramic matte painting / cinematic CGI still
Primary request: sweeping panorama of a Mars colony in the year 2387 — massive transparent dome cities rising from the red desert surface, with lush vegetation and skyscrapers visible inside the domes; exterior features giant solar energy collection arrays and atmospheric terraforming devices in operation; foreground shows a team of explorers in advanced spacesuits conducting geological surveys beside several six-wheeled Mars rovers; distant silhouette of Olympus Mons on the horizon
Scene/backdrop: Martian red desert surface, vast and barren; horizon line showing the faint outline of Olympus Mons; sky in Mars-characteristic orange-red hues with dust-diffused sunlight
Subject: multiple large transparent geodesic dome cities — interiors filled with green vegetation and futuristic high-rise buildings; exterior infrastructure includes sprawling solar panel arrays and atmospheric processor towers actively running; foreground team of explorers in sleek hard-sci-fi spacesuits performing geological fieldwork; 3–4 six-wheeled all-terrain Mars rovers parked nearby
Style/medium: hard sci-fi concept art, photorealistic CGI rendering, matte painting aesthetic
Composition/framing: ultra-wide panoramic composition, low horizon line, grand establishing shot emphasizing scale contrast between human figures and colossal dome structures
Lighting/mood: simulated Martian solar illumination — lower intensity than Earth, warm diffused orange-amber sunlight, long soft shadows, awe-inspiring and epic in scale
Color palette: dominant ochre red and rust brown for terrain; orange-yellow sky; silver-grey metallic structures; warm amber sunlight; touches of green and blue inside domes as contrast
Materials/textures: dusty regolith ground surface with rocky outcrops; reflective transparent dome panels with subtle refraction; matte metallic spacesuit surfaces; solar panel grid textures; weathered rover chassis
Constraints: maintain hard sci-fi realism throughout; dome interiors must show visible greenery and architecture; Olympus Mons silhouette must be present on the horizon; explorer figures and rovers must be in foreground
Avoid: fantasy or soft sci-fi aesthetics, cartoon rendering, oversaturated neon colors, Earth-like blue sky
